text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh, ouch ouch ow ow OW! I've really done it
this time...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You don't think me injuring myself is going to
lower everyone else's morale, do you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What if it makes everyone afraid to train?! What... have I done?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I just need to take a quick march
through the academy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It might be painful and difficult... but if I put on a
brave face, it'll put everyone at ease!
choice_data_list:
There's nothing to worry about, so just get some
rest.
If you're only walking, I guess it's okay.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But! But! What about the Umamusume who might
be feeling uneasy because of me...
choice_data_list: They'll definitely see through your act.
They'll definitely see through your act.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you're right. If they notice me struggling, it'll
just make things worse.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uuuuugh, this suuucks... When pushed to the limit
and her mobility's taken away, what does a simp
have left?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Drum roll, please! All that's left is love... But,
ugh... I wish that love could help me walk...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I make Agnes Digital rest and try to cheer her up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's hurry up and go already!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Owwww!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze... Get a hold of yourself, Digitan. Picture your oshis. Banish all other thoughts from your mind and the pain will change into glory...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, trying to force herself to move was
a bad idea. Her recovery is delayed as a result.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fake it until you make it! I feel great! The
picture of health! Take a good look, beloved
Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait a sec... I feel like I actually do feel better now that I've walked a bit...

text_block_list.name: Digital's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Digital! You're already up and walking
around? What a relief! I'm so happy for you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O-o-o-of cooourse! As you can see, there's
absolutely nothing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Yes! I was able to protect their precious smiles.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I feel much better after seeing her
smiling face! Umas really do make the best
medicine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With some light exercise, and maybe thanks to
the smile of one of her oshis, Agnes Digital makes
a quick recovery.
